headline: Walmart’s Regenerative Gardening Push Tests ESG Appeal And Valuation Hopes
summary: Walmart, in partnership with Back to the Roots and Wakefield, is rolling out regenerative gardening and biochar-based soil products nationwide. The move targets the US$48b gardening segment with an emphasis on carbon sequestration and soil health. The initiative focuses on products that aim for measurable environmental outcomes, including carbon capture in soils. Walmart plans to pair product distribution with consumer education on regenerative practices and soil health. For investors...
